scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @ioi-dev/vue-table && npm run build --workspace @ioi/vue-table-playground
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --workspace @ioi-dev/vue-table && npm run typecheck --workspace @ioi/vue-table-playground
scripts.lint: npm run lint --workspace @ioi-dev/vue-table && npm run lint --workspace @ioi/vue-table-playground
scripts.ci: npm run lint && npm run typecheck && npm run test && npm run build
scripts.bench: npm run build --workspace @ioi-dev/vue-table && npm run bench --workspace @ioi/vue-table-bench
